cards.definitionEn: A document listing goods or services provided and the amount due.
cards.exampleEn: Please send the invoice to our accounting department by Friday.
cards.exampleZh: 请在周五前把发票发给我们的财务部门。

cards.definitionEn: A short official note or report circulated within an organization.
cards.exampleEn: All staff received a memorandum about the new security procedures yesterday.
cards.exampleZh: 全体员工昨天收到了一份关于新安全规程的备忘录。

cards.definitionEn: Paper, pens, and other materials used for writing in an office.
cards.exampleEn: Please order extra stationery for the new employees starting next Monday.
cards.exampleZh: 请为下周一入职的新员工订购额外的文具。

cards.definitionEn: A list of items to be discussed at a meeting.
cards.exampleEn: The budget review is the first item on today's agenda.
cards.exampleZh: 预算审查是今天议程上的第一项。

cards.definitionEn: A person or company that delivers documents or packages quickly.
cards.exampleEn: The signed documents were sent by courier to the head office this morning.
cards.exampleZh: 签署好的文件今天上午已由快递送往总部。

cards.definitionEn: A complete list or stock of goods held by a business.
cards.exampleEn: Staff will conduct a full inventory of office equipment at the end of the month.
cards.exampleZh: 员工将在月底对办公设备进行全面盘点。

cards.definitionEn: A failure of a machine or system to work correctly.
cards.exampleEn: The photocopier malfunction delayed the printing of the conference materials.
cards.exampleZh: 复印机故障耽误了会议材料的打印。

cards.definitionEn: To make a process happen more quickly.
cards.exampleEn: We hired extra staff to expedite the processing of customer orders.
cards.exampleZh: 我们增聘了人手以加快客户订单的处理。

cards.definitionEn: The buildings and land occupied by a business.
cards.exampleEn: Visitors must wear identification badges at all times on company premises.
cards.exampleZh: 访客在公司场所内必须始终佩戴身份识别牌。

cards.definitionEn: The act of repairing and improving a building.
cards.exampleEn: The third floor will be closed during the office renovation next month.
cards.exampleZh: 下个月办公室装修期间，三楼将暂停使用。
